# Claude Control Center Project Health

Use this file to inspect the repository from the root without memorizing commands.

## Workspace Summary

```bash qmd:name=workspace-summary cwd=..
pwd
find . -maxdepth 2 -type d | sort
```

## Backend Routes

```bash qmd:name=backend-routes cwd=..
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path

routes = sorted(Path("backend/app/routes").glob("*.py"))
for route in routes:
    if route.name != "__init__.py":
        print(route)
PY
```

## Frontend Scripts

```bash qmd:name=frontend-scripts cwd=../frontend
node -e "const pkg=require('./package.json'); console.log(pkg.scripts)"
```
